description: Project run inspection, Project sidebar routing, Workflow/XState views, Terminal routing, nested sessions, and human action controls.

userStories.title: Add session kind metadata for Project sidebar routing
userStories.description: As a Project user, I need the sidebar to distinguish real session types so that workflow navigation is clear.
acceptanceCriteria: Pibo Session metadata includes a stable session kind enum with values for main workflow, nested workflow, agent node, and subagent sessions
Sidebar data source returns only real Pibo Sessions and excludes logical workflow nodes, edges, guards, adapters, and state elements
Session kind metadata is available to Chat Web view routing
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Render real-session-only Project sidebar
userStories.description: As a Project user, I need sidebar entries to match persisted sessions so that navigation is not confused with logical graph nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Project sidebar shows main workflow, nested workflow, agent node, and subagent sessions when they exist
Sidebar uses distinct icons and accessible labels for each session kind
Logical workflow elements are inspectable only inside Workflow/XState/run views
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented real Pibo Session descendant inclusion for Project bootstrap and UI session-kind markers/labels in the Project sidebar.

userStories.title: Implement workflow versus terminal view routing
userStories.description: As a Project user, I need selected session context to choose the right view so that workflow and agent sessions are readable.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow and nested workflow sessions open Workflow/XState plus run view
Agent node and subagent sessions open Terminal view
Unknown or unsupported session kinds fall back safely without exposing wrong data
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build workflow run inspection panel
userStories.description: As a Project reviewer, I need run details so that I can understand current and historical workflow execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Run view renders status, current node, node attempts, edge transfers, output, and error sections with populated values or explicit empty states
Run view uses V1 XState projection for visualization only and kernel/run records for truth
Run view shows run history for the selected workflow Project session
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented Projects Workflow/XState run inspection panel with status, current node, run history, node attempts, edge transfers, output, error, and explicit empty states.

userStories.title: Add nested workflow and definition links
userStories.description: As a debugger, I need links between run view, nested sessions, and workflow definitions so that hierarchy is navigable.
acceptanceCriteria: A nested-workflow fixture creates a child session and the run view links to that child session entry
Run view links back to the Workflows tab definition when the live definition exists
Deleted definitions show a snapshot-only definition-deleted state instead of a broken link
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented run-view navigation links for nested workflow child sessions and live/snapshot-only workflow definition states.

userStories.title: Show configured/not-started pre-run state in Projects
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need pre-run sessions to be understandable before the workflow starts.
acceptanceCriteria: Configured workflow sessions show configuration summary and validation state
Configured workflow sessions show Start action and no current run attempts
Start-blocking diagnostics are displayed in the Project session context
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Configured/not-started Project sessions now show configuration and validation summaries, explicit Start, no-current-run-attempts states, and start-blocking diagnostics in the Project context.

userStories.title: Implement human action controls from wait tokens
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need to approve, reject, resume, or cancel waits without leaving the Project run view.
acceptanceCriteria: Run view lists pending registered human actions and payload requirements from persisted wait tokens
Approve, reject, resume, and cancel validate token state and resume payload before state changes
Invalid, missing, expired, already-resolved, or unauthorized wait-token/action refs are rejected with diagnostics
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented persisted Project workflow wait-token listing, approve/reject/resume/cancel submission controls, payload/state diagnostics, and tests.

userStories.title: Add run inspection and human action tests
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need tests for sidebar routing, run views, nested links, and human actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests verify sidebar session inclusion/exclusion and visual type markers
Tests verify workflow/nested sessions route to Workflow/XState view and agent/subagent sessions route to Terminal view
Tests verify approve, reject, resume, cancel, invalid payload, missing action ref, expired token, already-resolved token, and deleted-definition display
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added focused V2 run inspection/human action coverage tests, extended integration coverage for missing registered human action refs, and browser-verified the Project Workflow/XState run view with pending human actions and diagnostics.
